seoTitle: Concordia vs Condowie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Concordia and Condowie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Concordia and Condowie.
heading: Concordia vs Condowie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Concordia, South Australia and Condowie, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Condowie has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Concordia (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Concordia or Condowie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Concordia has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Condowie scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Concordia scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Condowie scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Concordia or Condowie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Condowie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
